tooltips.timeCapsule: Secure local memory for projects you created or imported into the system.
tooltips.envVault: Central hub that stores your frequently used API keys encrypted and injects them into projects.
tooltips.rdapDomain: Live domain ownership lookup on the web using the RDAP protocol.
tooltips.vibeMode: Your workspace kit for AI editor, music provider, and prompt automation.

onboarding.step1Desc: Enter project details and scaffold in seconds.
onboarding.step2Desc: Access and manage your past projects from here.
onboarding.step3Desc: Watch operations running in the background via Rust and Docker.
onboarding.step4Desc: Customize profile, language, Cloudflare API keys, and appearance.

projectsHub.title: My Projects
projectsHub.subtitle: Manage past projects and drafts from one control center.
projectsHub.sidebarHint: Select a project on the right first.
projectsHub.sidebarReady: Choose an action from the left menu.
projectsHub.pickerSubtitle: Pick from Time Capsule or drafts to open the control center.
projectsHub.empty: No projects yet. Create one on Home or import an external project.
projectsHub.noDiskPath: This draft is not saved to disk yet — file operations are unavailable.
projectsHub.diskPathRequired: A project path on disk is required for this action.
projectsHub.comingSoonStep: This panel will be enabled in the next step.

panels.api: Inject Supabase, Stripe, OpenAI, and custom API keys into the project.
panels.cicd: Add GitHub Actions workflow files to the project.
panels.env: Store global API keys in a secure vault and sync them to projects.
panels.vitrin: View project summary and prepare share visuals.
panels.media: Move logos, favicons, videos, and images into the project folder.

media.dropHint: Drag and drop files here or pick them
media.formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, SVG, ICO, WebP, MP4, WebM, MOV
media.injectSuccess: Media files were added to the project.
media.usePicker: Drag-and-drop is not supported here — use Choose Files.

env.secureDesc: API keys are encrypted with AES-256 and stored locally. Readable only on this device.
env.vaultHint: Each line must be KEY=value. Comment lines start with #.

api.inputHint: Each line must be KEY=value. Comment lines start with #.
api.noKeysEntered: Enter at least one valid key (KEY=value).

cicd.description: Creates a Node.js build/test workflow. Triggers on push/PR to main and master.

vitrin.exportButton: Export Share Image for Social Media
vitrin.exportHint: 1200×630 PNG — ideal size for social sharing.

import.externalModeBanner: 📦 External Project Mode: Settings were auto-detected. Please review fields marked in red.
import.fieldWarning: This feature was not detected in the project or is not supported by VB.

form.title: New Project
form.subtitle: Define your identity, pick your stack, start the vibe.

launch.title: Launch
launch.afterLaunchNote: After launch, the project opens in your selected AI code editor.
launch.noWebDeployMobile: Mobile apps ship via App Store / Play Store — no web deploy.
launch.noWebDeployDesktop: Desktop native apps are packaged for distribution — no web deploy.

vibeExtended.codeEditorDesc: Opens in the selected editor on Launch or Wake. Falls back if not installed.
vibeExtended.uiUxDesc: Opens the selected tool in the browser on Launch or Wake.
vibeExtended.musicDesc: Choose which platform opens on Launch or Wake. Set the track or playlist in {{settings}}.
vibeExtended.previewDesktopOnly: Preview only works in the desktop app.

integrationsExtended.baasDesc: Serverless database and cache providers — credentials are added to the project automatically.
integrationsExtended.dockerDesc: Creates docker-compose.yml, prepares Docker daemon, and starts the dev stack in the background.
integrationsExtended.dockerNote: On launch, images are pulled, containers run in -d mode, and health checks are awaited.
integrationsExtended.vaultNote: Keys are written to .env.local and encrypted in the VB vault.

logo.label: Logo
logo.fileTypesHelp: PNG, JPG, WebP, SVG, GIF — max 5 MB

docsSection.title: Documentation
docsSection.description: Explore VB features step by step.

aboutSection.title: About
aboutSection.body: Project scaffolding, vibe automation, and deploy configuration in one place — focus, build, repeat.

appearanceSection.title: Appearance
appearanceSection.description: Customize theme, accent color, and UI density.
appearanceSection.themeDesc: Use light, dark, or system theme.
appearanceSection.accentColorDesc: Primary color for buttons, selections, and accents.
appearanceSection.terminalFontDesc: Font for log output in the left panel.

profileSection.title: Profile
profileSection.description: Your developer identity, Git automation, and AI rules.
profileSection.identityBrandDesc: Your developer signature applied to projects.
profileSection.workspaceDesc: Default project directory and terminal preferences.
profileSection.aiVibeDesc: Universal rules and personal prompt guidance.

musicSection.title: Music
musicSection.description: Set the track, playlist, or search term to open on Launch or Wake.

domainSection.title: Domain
domainSection.description: Check domain availability, auto-configure DNS via Cloudflare, and update project files.
domainSection.cloudflareDesc: API token with Zone and DNS edit permissions. Stored on this device only.
domainSection.selectDeployHint: Select a deploy target on the home page.
domainSection.tokenRequired: Cloudflare token required for Magic DNS.

profileSectionFields.globalRulesPlaceholder: Code standards and language preferences for every project...
profileSectionFields.promptContextPlaceholder: Personal context appended to the clipboard prompt...

musicSectionExtended.queryPlaceholder: e.g. Lofi Girl, Deep Focus, spotify:playlist:...
musicSectionExtended.spotifyHelp: Track/playlist name, spotify:playlist:..., or open.spotify.com link.
musicSectionExtended.youtubeHelp: Search term or full URL. Leave empty for default focus music.

timeCapsule.title: Time Capsule
timeCapsule.subtitle: Restore your full environment with one click.
timeCapsule.empty: No projects yet. Create your first one on the right.
timeCapsule.wakeHint: Editor, Docker, browser tabs, and prompt

drafts.title: Drafts
drafts.subtitle: Saved projects live here — continue, edit, and launch when ready.
drafts.emptyDescription: Fill out the form on Home and tap {{draft}} — entries will appear here.

dependencyModal.title: Missing tools found
dependencyModal.subtitle: You need to install required tools before launching the project.
dependencyModal.editorNote: The code editor cannot be installed automatically. You can continue, but you'll need to open the editor manually after creation.
dependencyModal.promptInstall: Would you like me to install these for you? (System packages may require permission.)
dependencyModal.promptEditorOnly: No other tools are missing — you can launch directly.

log.title: Log
log.empty: No logs yet — operations appear here when you start a project.

toast.cloudflareTokenRequired: Enter your Cloudflare API token first.
toast.dnsSuccess: DNS records and project files updated.
toast.projectReady: "{{name}}" is ready — editor opened, prompt on clipboard!
toast.wakeSuccess: Environment woken — editor, Docker, and tabs opened!
toast.logoTooLarge: Logo file must be smaller than 5 MB.

logs.environmentWoken: ✓ Full environment woken with one click.
logs.gitNotInstalledGithub: Git not installed — GitHub push skipped.
logs.gitNotInstalledSkip: Git not installed — git step skipped.
logs.githubNewTabOpened: GitHub new repo page opened in browser.
logs.devStackNotFound: VB Dev Stack configuration not found.
logs.npmMissingInstallNode: npm not found — installing Node.js first...
logs.depsInstallManual: Warning: Dependency install failed — you can run it manually.
logs.openedInFileManager: Opened in file manager (editor not found).
logs.codeEditorOpenDir: Code editor: {{editor}} — project folder will open.

vercel.label: Vercel
vercel.description: Zero-config deploy for Next.js and full-stack

netlify.label: Netlify
netlify.description: Fast global CDN for JAMstack and static sites

render.label: Render
render.description: Web services, API, and database on one platform

github-pages.label: GitHub Pages
github-pages.description: Free hosting for static sites via CI/CD
